caption: A man wearing a blue suit, white shirt, and patterned tie speaks at a podium. He is positioned in front of a light-colored background with vertical lines and green foliage visible on the right. A microphone is placed in front of him. On-screen text in a blue bar identifies the date and location as "14 APRIL 2018 · NASHVILLE, TN" and the topic as "Trump's Economy: Boom Times or Dangerous Bubble?". As the clip progresses, the text changes to identify the speaker as "L. CARLOS LARA" and his title as "CEO, United Services and Trust Corporation". Small text reading "Murphy Table" is visible in the bottom left. The man's expression shifts from serious to smiling as he speaks. In one shot, another man in a tan jacket partially enters the frame from the left, momentarily obscuring the speaker.
